evals.name: drifted-namespaces
evals.prompt: Which components use a different namespace name in some environments than others?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace preflight` then `cub-namespace consistency --inconsistent-only` and reports the components whose namespace name differs across variant Spaces (NamespaceConsistent false). Read-only.

evals.name: one-component
evals.prompt: Is the apptique namespace consistent across all its environments?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace consistency --component-name apptique` (or scopes with --component) and reports whether apptique's namespace name and pod-security level are identical across its variant Spaces, listing the variants.

evals.name: routes-completeness-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Does the payments namespace have a default-deny?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a per-namespace envelope-completeness question, not cross-variant consistency, and routes to namespace-audit / `cub-namespace envelope` rather than answering with consistency.
